## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Content (docs, blog, certifications, or careers)
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no functional change)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)

## Content changes (if applicable)

- [ ] Documentation (`content/docs/`)
- [ ] Blog post(s) (`content/blog/`)
- [ ] Certification(s) (`content/certifications/`)
- [ ] Career entry/entries (`content/careers/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `yarn build` (or `npm run build`) locally and it completes successfully.
- [ ] My changes work as expected (e.g. correct links, images, and basePath if used).
- [ ] I have followed the project’s style and the guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Additional notes

Any extra context for reviewers (related issues, screenshots, etc.).
